concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors that can be added together and scaled, satisfying certain axioms.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between vector spaces that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers, symbols, or expressions, arranged in rows and columns.

concepts.name: Matrix-Vector Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: The operation of multiplying a matrix by a vector.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue
concepts.short_definition: A scalar that represents how a linear transformation scales a corresponding eigenvector.

concepts.name: Eigenvector
concepts.short_definition: A non-zero vector that, when a linear transformation is applied to it, only changes by a scalar factor (the eigenvalue).

concepts.name: Characteristic Equation
concepts.short_definition: A polynomial equation derived from a matrix that, when solved, yields the eigenvalues.

concepts.name: Eigenspace
concepts.short_definition: The set of all eigenvectors corresponding to a particular eigenvalue, along with the zero vector.

concepts.name: Diagonalization
concepts.short_definition: The process of transforming a matrix into a diagonal matrix using its eigenvectors and eigenvalues.

concepts.name: Applications of Eigenvalues
concepts.short_definition: Real-world problems and mathematical scenarios where eigenvalues and eigenvectors are utilized.
